Package org.rodinp.core.tests.builder

Class ProjectDependenciesTest

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.builder.AbstractBuilderTest
org.rodinp.core.tests.builder.ProjectDependenciesTest
public class ProjectDependenciesTest extends AbstractBuilderTest
Tests for builds with dependencies between two projects.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    assertFileWithDependencyContents()
    Checks that P/y contains its data ("two") and the data imported from its dependency ("one").

    void
    setUp()
     
    void
    tearDown()
     
    void
    testDependenciesProjectsOneTwo()
    Ensures dependency works if target in another project is built before dependency
    void
    testDependenciesProjectsSingleBuildFails()
    Ensures building a project without its dependencies in another project fails, and then succeeds when the dependencies get created.
    void
    testDependenciesProjectsTwoOne()
    Ensures dependency works if source is built before target in another project (source has to be rebuilt)
    void
    testDependenciesProjectsUpdates()
    Ensures that a project is rebuilt if a dependency in another project is modified.
    void
    testDependenciesRemoval()
    Ensures that when the dependency between two projects is removed, the builder removes it too.
